project.name: LibMgnt
project.status: Admin Reporting & Auth Session Stability Phase Completed

database_schema.summary: Database quan hệ PostgreSQL quản lý: Người dùng, Danh mục, Sách, Phiếu mượn và Phí phạt trễ hạn (fineAmount).
database_schema.relationships_explained: 1 Category có nhiều Book. 1 User có nhiều BorrowRecord. 1 BorrowRecord có nhiều BorrowItem. Quá hạn được tính động dựa trên dueDate.

api_endpoints.explained: Login: receives email/password, returns user info + JWT token
Register: creates new user, returns user info + JWT token
Get current profile info via JWT token
Get summary metrics for a specific month (borrows, returns, overdues, fines)
Get current repository snapshot: total, available, borrowed, and category breakdown
Get engagement & risk report: top readers and reader watchlist
Get reader detail with computed stats: totalFine and overdueCount
List books with server-side pagination/filtering (search, category, availability)
Fetch book info from external sources by ISBN (includes coverUrl)
List all book categories with server-side pagination & search
Bulk delete categories (refused if any category contains books)
Create/List borrowing transactions with multi-book support
Process book returns, calculate fines (5,000 VND/day), and update reader limits atomically

business_rules: Strict DRY principle, no logic duplication
Shared UI components must reside in src/components/ui
API calls via axios instance with Authorization header
RBAC: Admin-only Reports and advanced management
Category Mapping for external data standardization
DataTable usage: Always use server-side pagination/search for main resource tables
Strict English UI and Toast standard
Call Number Generation: base + numeric sequence suffix (.1, .2) for duplicates
Compute-on-read Overdue Pattern: Overdue status is calculated dynamically (today > dueDate) to ensure 100% accuracy without cron jobs
Fine Calculation: fine = overdueDays * 5,000 VND, calculated and persisted only upon return
Reader Stats: Profiles must show lifetime total fine paid and current overdue count
UX row-click: Main DataTables (Readers, Borrow) must support row-click to open detail drawers
Auth Persistence: Initialize user state from localStorage on mount and verify via /auth/me for seamless refresh
features: Admin Reporting System: Monthly, Inventory, and Reader Activity snapshot reports
Export System: Multi-format support (CSV via PapaParse, PDF via jsPDF) for report docs
Dashboard: Overview of books and readers with Recharts trend visualization
Authentication: JWT-based Login/Register with optimized session persistence
Protected Routes: Role-based access control with secure Admin-only sections
ISBN Integration: Smart book info auto-fetch with cover preview
Book Management: Advanced DataTable with server-side pagination, filters, and bulk actions
Category Management: CRUD with bulk delete and book constraints
Generic DataTable: Reusable component for standardized tables
Borrow Management: POS-style workflow with real-time validation and multi-book transactions
Overdue Tracking: Dynamic visual indicators and pulse badges for late books
Fine Management: Automated penalty calculation and historical fine tracking
Reader Profile Stats: Financial and borrowing reliability overview in reader details

patterns: Atomic UI Decomposition: Smaller components for better maintainability
Module-Based Types: Split interfaces by feature
Service Fallback: OpenLibrary as fallback for Google Books
Generic DataTable Pattern: Decoupled table UI from data fetching logic
useDataTable Hook: Centralized state for server-side table operations
Compute-on-read Overdue Pattern for real-time accurate state
gotchas: TypeScript v5.5+: Avoid Enums, use 'const object + type' or 'import type' for external libs
Vite ESM: Must use 'import type' for @tanstack/react-table types to avoid SyntaxError
Prisma DB Connection: Restart server after .env changes
Prisma Relations: Use 'connect' syntax for categoryId mapping during create/update
Prisma null types: Optional fields in Prisma return 'null', must be handled in TS interfaces as 'number | null'
Browser CSV Library: json2csv alpha uses Node streams; use PapaParse for browser-compatible CSV generation
Auth Synchronization: Initialize user/token states from localStorage simultaneously to prevent unauthorized redirects on refresh
Prisma Logic Gotcha: Field-to-field comparison in gt/lt requires raw SQL or specific Prisma version syntax; avoid GT on nested objects
conventions: English Localization for all UI and code comments
